name: NFL PRO ERA
summary: Step onto the field and begin your legacy in the latest NFL and NFLPA-licensed VR experience, NFL PRO ERA. This season, you’re not only running the offense as a quarterback but also showcasing your skills on defense by calling plays and filling gaps as a linebacker in single-player mode. This year brings a new level of immersion, putting you inside the rush of an NFL game like never before. In the huddle, your teammates are locked in on you, responding to your play calls and reacting to your leadership...
